verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I can't believe the way Your love has got a hold on me Each morning I wake to find You near You lift me above my fears and set my feet on solid ground All of my days belong to You

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And I breathe in Your breath of life that fills my heart You are my all consuming fire

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I stand here before You in wide opened wonder Amazed at the glory of You The power of heaven revealing Your purpose in me As I'm reaching for You

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I can't believe the way Your love has got a hold on me Each morning I wake to find You near You lift me above my fears and set my feet on solid ground All of my days belong to You

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: And I breathe in Your breath of life that fills my heart You are my all consuming fire

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: /: And I stand here before You in wide opened wonder Amazed at the glory of You The power of heaven revealing Your purpose in me As I'm reaching for You :/ 4x

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Reaching for You Reaching for You Reaching for You

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: And I stand here before You in wide opened wonder Amazed at the glory of You The power of heaven revealing Your purpose in me As I'm reaching for You
